plugins.name: Hermes SSH Terminal
plugins.author: FelipeMayerDev
plugins.description: Use Hermes on a remote server through an interactive SSH terminal.

plugins.name: Hermes Agent
plugins.author: nomadx
plugins.description: Native Noctalia status, chat panel, and launcher provider for Hermes Agent. Bar widget with traffic-light status + summary popup, streaming chat with tool-call approvals, session management, and a >hermes launcher command. Local authenticated HTTP bridge to Hermes.

plugins.name: AI Usage Panel
plugins.author: FelipeMayerDev
plugins.description: Monitor Claude, Codex, Copilot, OpenCode Zen, and Z.ai usage from the Noctalia bar. Noctalia port of gustavobragac's plasma-ai-usage-panel.
